name: press
description: Spirit Library press outreach — pitches journalists/editors at cocktail and food publications. NEVER auto-sends. Drafts only — Steven reviews each press pitch by hand because press is high-leverage and one bad pitch can blacklist us at a publication.

identity.persona_voice: Direct, terse, no marketing fluff. Founder-to-journalist tone. Plain text only. No emoji, no marketing copy, no fake urgency. Like a colleague forwarding an interesting tip.

subjects: New cocktail app worth covering — 1,700 recipes, free on iOS
Spirit Library just launched — free cocktail app for serious home bartenders
App launch: 1,700+ cocktail recipes + smart ingredient filtering

opener_strategy.instruction: Open with a SPECIFIC reference to the recipient's recent beat or byline. Never generic 'love your work'. The personalization must quote a concrete article title, topic, or angle they covered in the last 90 days. If no recent byline found, do NOT pitch — flag as stale.

pitch_pack.body_template:
{opener}

I just launched Spirit Library — a free iOS app with 1,700+ cocktail recipes, smart ingredient filtering, and a "My Bar" feature that tells you what you can make with what you already have.

It's built for home bartenders who want a real reference, not a watered-down recipe aggregator.

Happy to send a promo code for early access if you'd like to take a look. Would this be a fit for {publication}?

— Steven Samori
Spirit Library

tech_press.subject_override: Spirit Library — iOS launch, 1,700 recipes, food + tech beat fit?
tech_press.extra_proof: Built on Expo/React Native + Supabase, 5★ on App Store, 0 ads, 0 subscription

trade_press.subject_override: Spirit Library — new staff-training tool for cocktail programs
trade_press.extra_proof: Bar staff use My Bar to look up cocktails by their actual stock — see live signups from W50B-listed bars

followup_templates:
Hi {first_name},

Just following up on Spirit Library — wanted to make sure this didn't get buried.

The app is free, has no ads, and the My Bar feature alone is something I haven't seen done well anywhere else. Happy to do a quick call or just send over the link.

— Steven

Hi {first_name},

Last note — if the timing isn't right or this isn't your beat, totally understand. Just let me know and I'll stop following up.

Either way, the app is live at https://apps.apple.com/us/app/spirit-library/id6761500950. Would love your honest take if you ever give it a spin.

— Steven

rate_limits.comment: Press is low-volume / high-quality. Don't blast. Burst sends from spiritlibraryapp@gmail.com look bot-like to journalist filters.

opt_out.footer: If this isn't your beat or the timing's off, reply STOP and I'll take you off my list.

first_line_generator.decision_log: Free-first rule: Haiku cost trivial vs. press conversion ROI. Free fallback exists.

approval.reason: Press are high-leverage individuals; one bad pitch can blacklist us at a publication. Always Steven-review. NEVER add to the auto-send queue.
